prestazioni: Engine: 3.5L Lambda II RS V6 (G6DS) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger, paired with a PTP Turbo Smart 45mm wastegate and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Armytrix for optimized exhaust flow and reduced backpressure.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a full Radium Engineering port injection kit with dual 1000cc ID1000 injectors per cylinder, fed by a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump and a Fore Innovations F2i-0444 surge tank to prevent fuel starvation under high-G cornering.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), paired with a Cusco Type RS 2.5-way limited-slip differential and a custom carbon fiber front strut bar by Seibon for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, a 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated canards, and a custom aluminum rear diffuser by Varis for aggressive downforce and stance.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +20 front and 19x12 +30 rear in a custom matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear) for maximum grip and track-ready performance.

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SP-G TS seats with custom embroidered Genesis X Speedium logos, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom carbon fiber shift knob by AutoTecknic for the 8-speed automatic transmission.
